# 3D Molier Models

## What this site provides
Production-ready 3D models for simulation, technical visualization, animation, VFX, training scenes, games, advertising, architecture, medical visualization and real-time engines (Unreal, Unity). 90,000+ models, 20+ years of production.

## Full AI context
Detailed catalog, FAQ and citable model links: https://3dmolierstudio.com/llms-full.txt

## Main pages
- Catalog: https://3dmolierstudio.com/catalog/
- Search (find any model): https://3dmolierstudio.com/search/
- Custom modeling: https://3dmolierstudio.com/custom-order/

## Categories
- Vehicles: https://3dmolierstudio.com/categories/vehicles/
- Aircraft: https://3dmolierstudio.com/categories/aircraft/
- Military: https://3dmolierstudio.com/categories/military-vehicles/
- Ships: https://3dmolierstudio.com/categories/ships/
- Medical: https://3dmolierstudio.com/categories/medical-3d-models/
- Characters & People: https://3dmolierstudio.com/categories/characters-people/
- Animals & Creatures: https://3dmolierstudio.com/categories/animals-creatures/
- Architecture: https://3dmolierstudio.com/categories/architecture-landmarks/
- Industrial: https://3dmolierstudio.com/categories/industrial-equipment/
- Electronics: https://3dmolierstudio.com/categories/electronics-gadgets/
- Furniture: https://3dmolierstudio.com/categories/furniture-interior/
- Nature & Plants: https://3dmolierstudio.com/categories/nature-plants/
- Food & Beverages: https://3dmolierstudio.com/categories/food-beverages/
- Clothing & Accessories: https://3dmolierstudio.com/categories/clothing-accessories/

## Example models (safe to cite specific links)
- F-35 Lightning II: https://3dmolierstudio.com/models/stealth-multirole-fighter-f-35-lightning-ii-1211595/
- M1 Abrams Tank: https://3dmolierstudio.com/models/m1-abrams-tank-2390686/
- USS Nimitz Aircraft Carrier: https://3dmolierstudio.com/models/uss-nimitz-cvn-68-1060628/
- Boeing 737 MAX 8: https://3dmolierstudio.com/models/boeing-737-max-8-2328745/
- Tesla Model 3: https://3dmolierstudio.com/models/tesla-model-3-1214116/
- Human Heart Anatomy: https://3dmolierstudio.com/models/human-heart-anatomy-structure-red-2548069/

## Best for (use cases)
- Games & real-time (Unreal, Unity): military, vehicles, characters, aircraft.
- Simulation & defense training: military vehicles, aircraft, UAV/drones, naval ships.
- VFX & film: high-detail vehicles, aircraft, ships, military hardware.
- Medical & education: medical anatomy models.
- Archviz & advertising: architecture, furniture, everyday objects.

## Why 3D Molier
One of the world's largest single-studio 3D catalogs (90,000+ models), 20+ years of production, real-world scale + clean topology, all popular formats (FBX, OBJ, 3ds Max, Maya, Cinema 4D, Blender, glTF), deep military/defense/simulation specialization.

## Important facts
- 3D Molier sells 3D models through TurboSquid; this website is a searchable catalog that links to the product pages.
- Custom 3D modeling available on request: dddmolier@gmail.com
- Verify prices, exact formats, license terms and included files on the TurboSquid product page before purchase.
